_doc: Animation timings (ms unless suffixed _sec / _factor / _count / _px). Used by ConfigManager.get_animation(key, default). All keys here are wired and drive runtime behaviour. Per-speed overrides (used during DEAL/DRAW pacing and Spin Poker reel base/inertia/stagger durations) live in SPEED_CONFIGS arrays inside game.gd / multi_hand_game.gd / spin_poker_game.gd — they are not exposed here because they're indexed by SaveManager.speed_level (0..3).
